src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.general_idea: Refactor logout method to use a dedicated request object with @SpringQueryMap instead of individual @RequestParam arguments.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.before: void logout(@RequestParam(name = "version", defaultValue = "6") int version, @RequestParam(name = "method", defaultValue = "logout") String method);

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.general_idea: Add consumes attribute to @GetMapping annotations to explicitly specify media type.
Update imports to reflect the new request objects and annotations used in the refactored methods.
Refactor individual request parameters into a dedicated request object annotated with @SpringQueryMap for cleaner API definition.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.before: @RequestParam(name = "version", defaultValue = "1") int version, @RequestParam(name = "method", defaultValue = "query") String method, @RequestParam(name = "query", defaultValue = "all") String query

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.general_idea: Explicitly specify the consumed media type as JSON in the GET mapping.
Update imports to reflect the new request object and SpringQueryMap usage, removing unused RequestParam import.
Changed the base API endpoint from query.cgi to entry.cgi to align with DSM API standards.
Replaced individual @RequestParam annotations with a single @SpringQueryMap object to handle complex query parameters.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.before: @RequestParam(name = "version", defaultValue = "8") int version, @RequestParam(name = "method", defaultValue = "GetInfo") String method

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.general_idea: Added a new method to retrieve the list of surveillance cameras.
Added a new method to retrieve detailed information about surveillance cameras.
Added a new method to capture a snapshot from a surveillance camera.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.after: @GetMapping(path = "/webapi/entry.cgi?api=SYNO.SurveillanceStation.Camera", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE, produces = MediaType.IMAGE_JPEG_VALUE) ResponseEntity<byte[]> getSurveillanceCameraSnapshot(@SpringQueryMap CameraSnapshotRequest cameraSnapshotRequest);

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.general_idea: Updated imports to include new request models and Spring annotations used in the refactored API methods.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/confi.general_idea: Add import for the new DsmApiInformation model class to support the new bean definition.
Register a new Spring bean for DsmApiInformation to capture API info for later use.
Add import for ApiInfo model class to support new API information capture logic.
Add import for DsmApiInformation model class to support new API information capture logic.
Remove unused static constant SID as it is no longer referenced in the code.
Inject DsmApiInformation bean to store API details captured from responses.
Refactor decode method to handle multiple response types (ApiInfo and AuthSessionToken) separately instead of a single combined check.
Add helper method to process and store API information details from the response.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.general_idea: Annotate the model class with @Component to register it as a Spring-managed bean.
Remove the @NoArgsConstructor annotation because the class now uses final fields requiring an all-args constructor.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.why_exists: Compile error: @NoArgsConstructor cannot generate a constructor for a class with final fields that are not initialized in the declaration.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.general_idea: Change instance fields to final to enforce immutability and require initialization via the constructor.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.why_exists: Compile error: Final fields must be definitely assigned in the constructor or at declaration; removing @NoArgsConstructor without making fields final or providing a valid constructor would fail if the class relied on Lombok's default behavior for non-final fields.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.general_idea: Removed the @Component annotation to decouple the model class from the Spring IoC container, treating it as a plain data object.
Removed the @NoArgsConstructor annotation because the class now defines a private constructor with arguments and final fields, making a no-arg constructor impossible or undesirable.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.why_exists: Lombok cannot generate a no-args constructor for a class with final fields that are not initialized in the declaration, and the class explicitly defines a private constructor. Without removing this annotation, compilation fails due to conflicting constructor generation or inability to initialize final fields.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.general_idea: Changed fields to final to enforce immutability, aligning with the use of a private constructor and removing the no-args constructor.
Remove the import for lombok.NoArgsConstructor as it is no longer used in the class.
Remove the @NoArgsConstructor annotation to enforce immutability or rely on Lombok's default behavior changes.
Mark the 'code' field as final to ensure immutability, consistent with other fields in the class.
Removed the @NoArgsConstructor annotation from the class, likely because a no-args constructor is no longer required or is provided by other means.
Removed the explicit @JsonCreator constructor and field assignments in favor of Lombok-generated accessors and direct field mapping.
Renamed field customizedPortHttp to httpPort for clarity, retaining Jackson mapping.
Renamed field customizedPortHttps to httpsPort for clarity, retaining Jackson mapping.
Renamed field userPriv to userPrivilege for clarity, retaining Jackson mapping.
Added new field enableVideoRelay to capture additional API data.
Added new field hostname to capture additional API data.
Changed field isLicenseEnough from boolean to int to match API response type.
Added explicit Jackson mapping for licenseNumber field to handle typo in API key.
Added new field pluginHelperVersion to capture additional API data.
Added new field productName to capture additional API data.
Added new field timezone to capture additional API data.
Added new field timezoneTZDB to capture additional API data.
Added new field uid to capture additional API data.
Added new field webPluginVersion to capture additional API data.
Removed field isAdmin as it is no longer needed or provided by the API.
Removed field allowSnapshot as it is no longer needed or provided by the API.
Removed field allowManualRec as it is no longer needed or provided by the API.
Removed field allowDeleteRec as it is no longer needed or provided by the API.
Removed Jackson @JsonCreator and @JsonProperty annotations as they are no longer needed or compatible with the new Lombok-based field structure.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.why_exists: The constructor annotated with @JsonCreator is removed entirely; keeping the imports or annotations would cause compilation errors due to missing symbols or unused imports if the logic changes, but primarily the removal of the constructor breaks the previous deserialization contract.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.general_idea: Added a new 'small' integer field to the Version model.
Removed the explicit constructor for Version, likely relying on Lombok or default behavior.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.why_exists: The explicit constructor is removed. If code relied on this specific constructor signature for instantiation or Jackson deserialization (via @JsonCreator), it will fail at runtime or compile time if the class is no longer serializable/deserializable in the expected way.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.general_idea: Changed field visibility from private to package-private.
